---
title: 'All Projects'
css: '/styles/projects.css'
toc: false
sidebar: false
# title-block-style: none
---

```{=html}
<!-- start: gallery-wrapper -->
<div class="gallery-wrapper">
<div class="tag-filters" id="tag-filters">
  <button class="tag-btn active" data-tag="all" onclick="filterTag('all', this)">All</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="Python" onclick="filterTag('Python', this)">Python</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="R" onclick="filterTag('R', this)">R</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="NLP" onclick="filterTag('NLP', this)">NLP</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="Visualization" onclick="filterTag('Visualization', this)">Visualization</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="EDA" onclick="filterTag('EDA', this)">EDA</button>
  <button class="tag-btn" data-tag="Social Media" onclick="filterTag('Social Media', this)">Social Media</button>
</div>

<div class="project-gallery" id="project-gallery">

  <a class="project-card" href="catalan-referendum/" data-tags="Python,NLP,Social Media,Visualization">
    <h3>Twitter Sentiment Analysis of Catalan Referendum</h3>
    <p>Sentiment analysis on tweets surrounding the 2017 Catalan independence referendum using NLP techniques.</p>
    <div class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="project-tag">NLP</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Social Media</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Visualization</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="project-card" href="most-streamed-songs/" data-tags="R,EDA,Visualization">
    <h3>Most Streamed Songs on Spotify 2023</h3>
    <p>Exploratory analysis of the most-streamed tracks on Spotify in 2023, uncovering trends in music popularity.</p>
    <div class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">R</span>
      <span class="project-tag">EDA</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Visualization</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="project-card" href="student-media-usage/" data-tags="R,EDA,Social Media,Visualization">
    <h3>Student Social Media Usage & Addiction</h3>
    <p>Analysis of social media habits and addiction patterns among students, with behavioral and academic insights.</p>
    <div class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">R</span>
      <span class="project-tag">EDA</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Social Media</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Visualization</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a class="project-card" href="global-visa-cost/" data-tags="Python,EDA,Visualization">
    <h3>Global Visa Cost Analysis</h3>
    <p>A comparative study of visa costs across countries, exploring affordability and geographic patterns.</p>
    <div class="project-tags">
      <span class="project-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="project-tag">EDA</span>
      <span class="project-tag">Visualization</span>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>

</div>
<!-- end: gallery-wrapper -->

<script>
function filterTag(tag, btn) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.tag-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');

  document.querySelectorAll('.project-card').forEach(card => {
    if (tag === 'all') {
      card.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else {
      const tags = card.dataset.tags.split(',');
      card.classList.toggle('hidden', !tags.includes(tag));
    }
  });
}
</script>
```
